docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $480.00 FILED BY AGUIRRE JORGE AS TO DEFENDANT PANSINI CORPORATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-25-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 06
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION FEB-25-1991, CONTINUED BY COURT TO MAR-11-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 06

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AGUIRRE JORGE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT PANSINI CORPORATION PLT NOT THE OWNER OF THE CAR ALLEGEDLY DAMAGED STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
